chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 346 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA 5142/2025. 12.12.2025. Mr. Aroon Kumar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Atif Imran Khwaja, Advocate for respondent No.3. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Subsequent to the order passed by this Court on 10.12.2025, the complainant’s spouse namely Mst. Jam Zadi who is also present in Court has furnished an affidavit of No Objection in support of the compromise. Accordingly, impugned order dated 27.05.2025 is set aside as the matter has been compromised in terms of the documents herein filed by the parties. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
